[ Enterprise Quantum Security ]
# The encryption protecting your world is already expiring.
Every day without a roadmap compounds a permanent security debt that no future patch can resolve.
Quantum computing will break every system built on RSA and ECC.The data being harvested today is being held for that day. **QNu is the quantum-safe platform built to outlast it:** sovereign, end-to-end, decade-deep.
[Get Your Quantum Roadmap](https://www.qnulabs.com/request-a-demo)[Why This is Urgent](https://www.qnulabs.com/#section-002)

[ The Problem Is Here. The Problem Is Global. ]
## Encryption is expiring.   
The damage is already happening, _silently_
Adversaries are quietly collecting encrypted data from governments, banks, hospitals, telcos, and enterprises right now. They cannot decrypt it today. They do not need to. **They are warehousing it,** waiting for the quantum computer that hands them the keys. Decades of sensitive intelligence, healthcare files, and financial records are already in hostile hands, waiting to be unlocked.
This is not a routine vulnerability that can be patched in a standard update cycle. A vulnerability impacts a system. **The collapse of cryptography undermines the entire infrastructure.**
$100 T+
The quantum threat puts $100T+ of the digital economy at risk.
[World Economic Forum](https://weforum.org/publications/transitioning-to-a-quantum-secure-economy)
$18.7 T+
in global digital payments processed every year.
[McKinsey Global Payments Report](https://www.mckinsey.com/industries/financial-services/our-insights/global-payments-report)
$2.7 T+
in global military spending depends on encrypted command and control.
[SIPRI](https://www.sipri.org/publications/2025/sipri-fact-sheets/trends-world-military-expenditure-2024\))
The attack has a name: Harvest Now, Decrypt Later. It is happening at scale, today. If your data has a shelf life, it has a target on its back.
[Get Your Quantum Roadmap](https://www.qnulabs.com/request-a-demo)
[ A Fatal Boardroom Blind Spot ]
## AI exposes vulnerabilities. Quantum security threats destroy the foundation itself.
Boardrooms are panicking over AI-driven attacks, pouring billions into surface-level defenses. But this obsession creates a fatal blind spot, masking a far more catastrophic countdown.
They are not the same problem and cannot be solved with the same tool. Conflating them is exactly why most security strategies are already obsolete.
AI-DRIVEN THREATS
### Find the cracks. Exploit the surface.
AI accelerates how attackers find vulnerabilities and scale breaches. It compromises applications and systems: painful, expensive, recoverable.
Verdict: A bad day. A breach response. A board meeting. Survivable.
QUANTUM THREATS
### Break the foundation underneath everything.
A quantum computer instantly breaks standard encryption - leaving every protected channel permanently transparent, with no workaround.
Verdict: An extinction-level event for organisations failing to migrate.
### A quantum-safe security architecture that protects both the surface and the foundation.
QUANTUM THREATS
QUANTUM THREATS
Data stolen today is a ticking time bomb. Once quantum processors come online, every locked vault opens instantly. You cannot patch a collapsed foundation.
**TWO THREATS. ONE ANSWER**
### When breach is inevitable, resilience is the only strategy.
Read: [How Mythos collapsed 2.3 years into 24 hours→](https://www.qnulabs.com/whitepaper/mythos-compressed-the-exploit-timeline-from-2-3-years-to-24-hours-your-encryption-is-now-the-last-line-of-defence)
[ The Math Is Brutally Simple ]
## There is only one variable you control: Migration time.
You cannot shorten your data's shelf life (Y). You cannot delay the arrival of quantum computers (Z). The only variable you control is your migration time (X).
**Mosca's Inequality: The Risk**
### X + Y > Z
If your migration time plus your data's shelf life exceeds the years until Q-Day, you face structural failure. **Your organisation is already exposed.**
**QNu's Derivation: Survival of Equality**
### XΔ + Y ≤ Z
Migration without migraine. Accelerated migration baked in sovereignty. We shrink the timeline (**XΔ**) to force the math to balance, turning a guaranteed breach into survival.
**Miss this window, and you trigger an unrecoverable 50-year encryption debt on data being harvested right now.** Migrating with foreign tech just trades one vulnerability for another. True sovereignty guarantees absolute, backdoor-free control.   
  
But, before the roadmap, before migration, you need the map. CBOM discovers every cryptographic asset across your enterprise, certificates, keys, libraries, protocols and algorithms, maps their dependencies, and shows you exactly where your quantum risk lives.
[Request a CBOM Assessment](https://www.qnulabs.com/request-a-demo)
[ A Decade of Conviction ]
## We never leave anyone with just the problem.
QNu saw this coming in 2016 and started building. While the world treated quantum as research, we treated it as an infrastructure deadline. **Today we are the only company in the world delivering a full-stack quantum-safe platform:** Sovereign, Military-grade validated, Enterprise-ready.
01
### Discovery
Map your hidden cryptographic estate. Encryption is the most unmanageable asset; we make it auditable.
02
### Assessment
Score every system against quantum risk. Identify what's exposed, salvageable, and needs replacing.
03
### Roadmap
A migration plan tied to your data shelf life and regulatory window, not a theoretical one.
04
### Implementation
Standardised interfaces, SaaS-first deployment, hybrid PQC + QKD. Cost-effective and sovereign.
[ The Quantum-Safe Stack ]
## Three pillars. One platform.   
Zero weak links.
// Three pillars
### [ARMOS (QKD) Keys encoded in single photons. Any interception collapses the quantum state and is instantly detected. 150–200 km point-to-point, nearly double the global standard. Learn more → ](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-key-distribution)### [TROPOS (QRNG) True quantum randomness at high throughput. NIST ESV-certified entropy no classical or quantum computer can predict or reverse-engineer. Learn more → ](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-random-number-generator)### [HODOS (PQC) NIST-compliant Post-Quantum Cryptography enhanced with quantum-physics entropy. Deploys on existing infrastructure with full crypto-agility. Learn more → ](https://www.qnulabs.com/post-quantum-cryptography)
// ONE PLatform
### [QShield™ Platform World’s first unique quantum security platform QRNG, QKD, PQC, and key management: unified into one vertically integrated, crypto-agile platform. Not a point solution. A complete quantum-safe operating layer. The world's first hybrid end-to-end full-stack quantum security platform, spanning all seven layers of the security stack. From CBOM discovery and gap analysis to a practical roadmap and agile migration — QShield compresses the journey to quantum-safe. Learn more →](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-security-platform)

Adversaries are quietly collecting encrypted data from governments, banks, hospitals, telcos, and enterprises right now. They cannot decrypt it today. They do not need to. They are warehousing it, waiting for the quantum computer that hands them the keys. Decades of sensitive intelligence, healthcare files, and financial records are already in hostile hands, waiting to be unlocked.

This is not a routine vulnerability that can be patched in a standard update cycle. A vulnerability impacts a system. The collapse of cryptography undermines the entire infrastructure.

[ A Fatal Boardroom Blind Spot ]

AI exposes vulnerabilities. Quantum security threats destroy the foundation itself.

Boardrooms are panicking over AI-driven attacks, pouring billions into surface-level defenses. But this obsession creates a fatal blind spot, masking a far more catastrophic countdown.

They are not the same problem and cannot be solved with the same tool. Conflating them is exactly why most security strategies are already obsolete.

[ The Math Is Brutally Simple ]

There is only one variable you control: Migration time.

You cannot shorten your data's shelf life (Y). You cannot delay the arrival of quantum computers (Z). The only variable you control is your migration time (X).

Mosca's Inequality: The Risk

X + Y > Z

If your migration time plus your data's shelf life exceeds the years until Q-Day, you face structural failure. Your organisation is already exposed.

QNu's Derivation: Survival of Equality

XΔ + Y ≤ Z

Migration without migraine. Accelerated migration baked in sovereignty. We shrink the timeline (XΔ) to force the math to balance, turning a guaranteed breach into survival.

Miss this window, and you trigger an unrecoverable 50-year encryption debt on data being harvested right now. Migrating with foreign tech just trades one vulnerability for another. True sovereignty guarantees absolute, backdoor-free control.

But, before the roadmap, before migration, you need the map. CBOM discovers every cryptographic asset across your enterprise, certificates, keys, libraries, protocols and algorithms, maps their dependencies, and shows you exactly where your quantum risk lives.

[ The Quantum-Safe Stack ]

Three pillars. One platform.

// Three pillars

ARMOS (QKD)

Keys encoded in single photons. Any interception collapses the quantum state and is instantly detected. 150–200 km point-to-point, nearly double the global standard.

TROPOS (QRNG)

True quantum randomness at high throughput. NIST ESV-certified entropy no classical or quantum computer can predict or reverse-engineer.

Learn more →

HODOS (PQC)

NIST-compliant Post-Quantum Cryptography enhanced with quantum-physics entropy. Deploys on existing infrastructure with full crypto-agility.
